params.name: items
params.description: Array of contents list item objects shown in order.

params.name: text
params.description: Visible label for the contents list item.

params.name: href
params.description: Link destination for the item. Omit it when the item is the current page.

params.name: current
params.description: When true, renders the item as the current page instead of a link.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the contents list container.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the root contents list element.
